name: Docebo Learning Platform API
what_it_does: Docebo REST API for AI-powered corporate learning management system. Enables AI agents to manage learners and courses, track completions and certifications, retrieve learning analytics, assign training, and integrate Docebo into HR and compliance workflows. Docebo is a widely-used enterprise LMS known for AI-powered learning paths and Skills framework.
use_cases: Enrolling employees in courses and learning paths from HR onboarding agents
Tracking learning completions and certification status from compliance agents
Retrieving learning analytics and skills data from L&D analytics agents
Integrating Docebo training data into HRIS and performance management agents
not_for: Academic/university LMS (Docebo is corporate training focused)
best_when: An enterprise L&D or HR team using Docebo wants AI agents to automate course enrollment, track compliance training, and integrate learning data into HR workflows.
avoid_when: PRIVACY: Employee learning records and skill assessments are personal data. Handle with care per employment law. GDPR compliance required for EU employees.

auth.notes: Docebo API uses OAuth 2.0 with client credentials grant for server-to-server integration and authorization code for user-delegated access. Granular scopes available.

pricing.paid_tiers: Engage and Elevate plans; pricing per active user
pricing.notes: Enterprise LMS pricing. API access included. Contact Docebo sales for pricing.

performance.rate_limits: API rate limits per client; documented in developer portal

known_agent_gotchas: PRIVACY: Employee learning records are personal data — handle per GDPR and employment law
No public MCP server — OAuth2 REST API integration required
Docebo uses versioned API (v1, v2) — ensure correct version for each endpoint
Course enrollment requires understanding Docebo's branch/group structure
Certification expiry tracking requires webhook subscriptions for expiry events
agent_readiness.security_notes: PRIVACY: Employee learning records, skill data, and certification status. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 with granular scopes. Multi-region data residency.

security_score_components.security_notes: Employee learning and skill data. SOC2, ISO27001, GDPR. OAuth2 with scopes. Multi-region data residency.
